transportedTraceSpace.name: X_aug
transportedTraceSpace.definition: closure Ran(R_aug) with quotient norm inf{||f||_V:R_aug f=x}

statement: The finite trace quotient norms induced by R_aug,N converge to the transported quotient norm on X_aug in the Mosco sense.

limsupRecoveryInputStatus.label: limsup recovery input
limsupRecoveryInputStatus.reason: Recovery sequences provide the upper bound for quotient norm convergence.

liminfCompactnessInputStatus.label: liminf compactness input
liminfCompactnessInputStatus.reason: Weak compactness and lower semicontinuity provide the lower bound for quotient norm convergence.

traceConvergenceInputStatus.label: strong trace convergence input
traceConvergenceInputStatus.reason: R_aug,N converges strongly to R_aug in transported graph-dual topology.

traceQuotientCompatibilityStatus.label: trace quotient compatibility
traceQuotientCompatibilityStatus.reason: Limsup gives recovery of quotient representatives, liminf prevents norm loss, and strong trace convergence identifies the limiting trace coordinate.

proof: Use limsup recovery to show finite quotient norms are no larger than the limiting quotient norm.
Use liminf compactness to show no quotient norm can disappear in the limit.
Use strong trace convergence to identify finite trace coordinates with R_aug f.
Conclude convergence of finite trace quotient spaces to X_aug.
